description: Write a Go main function for first run setup and crash logging. Silently create a Magshare workspace in the system user config directory (e.g: The local appdata folder on Windows). Redirect standard output to both the terminal and a temporary log file. Use defer and recover so if the app crashes, it moves the temp log to a logs folder in the workspace, prints the path, and keeps the window open for five seconds. On success, simply delete the temporary file.
